Name: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies
Tagline: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies offers cutting-edge programs for all grade levels. Learn more about our summer program & after-school enrichment courses!
About: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies was inaugurated by the Provost in 2012. SPCS is led by the Educational Outreach Programs division of Stanford Online High School (OHS), an accredited, diploma-offering, highly selective independent school for academically motivated students in grades 7-12.
Philosophy: Our residential staff work to support the academic and emotional needs of our summer program participants. This life-changing mentorship and teaching opportunity entices many staff members to return year after year.
Outcomes: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies participants often gain admission to top universities worldwide, leveraging enhanced critical thinking and problem-solving skills. Alumni frequently excel in STEM fields, humanities, and leadership roles.
Admissions: Prospective students apply online, typically requiring academic transcripts, teacher recommendations, and personal statements. Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis, with deadlines varying by program.
Quote: The residential staff fostered an inclusive environment. Their caring nature shined through in every circumstance, and whenever I had any issues, I felt comfortable going to them for help.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies faculty include PhD holders and experienced educators specializing in advanced STEM and humanities subjects. Many instructors have over a decade of teaching experience in high-achieving academic environments.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: The program provides comprehensive counseling services and peer advisory systems to support student wellbeing. Dedicated residential staff facilitate community-building activities and workshops focused on emotional resilience and personal growth.
Performance.Academic Integration: Students engage in rigorous courses like Advanced Mathematics and Creative Writing, employing inquiry-based learning methods. The curriculum emphasizes critical thinking and collaborative projects, preparing participants for future academic challenges.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates frequently gain admission to Ivy League and other top-tier universities, with many excelling in international science and math competitions. Alumni pursue successful careers in fields such as engineering, medicine, and entrepreneurship.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: Students have access to state-of-the-art laboratories, modern classrooms, and a comprehensive library. The campus includes recreational facilities like swimming pools and tennis courts, enhancing the residential experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Stanford Pre-Collegiate Studies employs a robust system of progress reports and parent-teacher communications. Regular assessments and feedback sessions ensure students and families are informed of academic performance and development.
